texto: I don't claim to be a particularly good father. I'm flawed, let's say. I've certainly been affected by the experience of having kids... trying to be a father, at least. It's an amazing process. It's like songwriting: it's a complete mystery to me. I don't understand it - but I've certainly written about it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Loudon Wainwright III: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't claim to be a particularly good father. I'm flawed, let's say. I've certainly been affect…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, good, father pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de father e experience.

frase_original: I don't claim to be a particularly good father. I'm flawed, let's say. I've certainly been affected by the experience of having kids... trying to be a father, at least. It's an amazing process. It's like songwriting: it's a complete mystery to me. I don't understand it - but I've certainly written about it.
